# Pickled Citizens

> Lightweight pickleball league management tool for scheduling sessions, generating balanced teams, and tracking match history.

## Key Pages

- /: Home — league list, session history, lifetime win/loss stats
- /leagues/[id]: League detail — member management, role assignment, email invites
- /sessions/[id]: Session detail — team matchups, match scores, player stats
- /profile: User profile — name and self-reported DUPR rating
- /auth/signup: Create a new account
- /auth/signin: Sign in with email and password

## Features

- League creation and member management with invite-by-email
- Balanced team generation using DUPR ratings and a snaking algorithm
- Session scheduling with 6, 8, 10, or 12-player support
- Match result tracking with individual and team win/loss records
- Session history sorted upcoming-first, then past sessions most-recent-first
- Admin roles per league — sole-admin protection prevents orphaned leagues
- Open Graph social sharing for sessions

## Tech Stack

Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth), Cloudflare Workers

## About

Pickled Citizens is a free tool for recreational pickleball players to organize and track their league play. Live at https://pickledcitizens.com.
